creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
Hello Maxim

On 03.04.2013 09:59, Maxim Konovalov wrote:
> This change was committed to head and stable/8,9 in January, 2013.
> Could you clarify what are you asking for?

Oh, sorry, I did not check in the source code. I just looked in 
the PR which was still untouched and open. So I did send the 
followup. Everything is fine now, thank you very much.


bye
Fabian
